enableBanner.name: Display banners
enableBanner.hint: Shows a banner when a critical success or critical failure occurs.

enableSound.name: Play sounds
enableSound.hint: Plays a sound when a banner is displayed.

soundVolume.name: Sound volume
soundVolume.hint: Volume level of the module sounds.

criticalSoundPath.name: Custom sound – critical success
criticalSoundPath.hint: Leave empty to use the default sound. Only the GM can choose a custom audio file.

fumbleSoundPath.name: Custom sound – critical failure
fumbleSoundPath.hint: Leave empty to use the default sound. Only the GM can choose a custom audio file.

criticalExitEffect.name: Exit effect – critical success
criticalExitEffect.hint: Choose the animation used when the critical success banner disappears.

fumbleExitEffect.name: Exit effect – critical failure
fumbleExitEffect.hint: Choose the animation used when the critical failure banner disappears.
